item.title: New contract and name for large deepwater rig
item.description: Noble Greatwhite will work in the UK North Sea before assignment in Norway

item.title: Oil flowing again from West Africa FPSO
item.description: Baobab field offshore Ivory Coast back on stream after floater's refurbishment

item.title: Angola-focused player eyes exploration success as independent status secured
item.description: Dramatic market changes in 2026 meant Afentra could raise finance to invest in Angola E&P activities

item.title: Two in race to provide offshore production unit at flagship asset
item.description: Technical and commercial offers for the mobile offshore production unit (MOPU) were recently submitted to ONGC

item.title: SBM lines up yards for TotalEnergies’ Venus FPSO as July FID nears
item.description: With TotalEnergies targeting FID in July FID, SBM has reserved yard slots across Asia for the Venus FPSO's hull and topsides

item.title: US oilfield service workforce expanded in May
item.description: More than 3600 positions were added on the back of higher oil and gas prices

item.title: Canadian LNG project moves forward with pending European deal
item.description: Ksi Lisims LNG attracts European interest despite its location on Canada's Pacific coast

item.title: ReconAfrica starts production tests on Namibia well
item.description: Results from onshore Owambo basin well due to be released by late July

item.title: Brazilian indie set to reach peak production at pre-salt field
item.description: Prio will produce about 40,000 bpd from Campos basin development

item.title: BP taps SLB OneSubsea for Thunder Horse workover
item.description: SLB's subsea tech unit will supply boosting equipment for BP's largest oil and gas platform

item.title: UK to retender offshore wind site dropped by BP joint venture
item.description: BP joint venture and EnBW dropped plans for offshore wind farm at Morgan site in Irish Sea after missing out on power deal in UK’s AR7 auction in January

item.title: Ukraine carries out drone strikes threatening Russia Black Sea oil exports
item.description: Assaults target major storage hub near Black Sea port and pipeline pumping facility

item.title: Underground CO₂ injection could boost geologic hydrogen production — but only in the right rocks and at the right temperatures: study
item.description: The added CO₂, however, can also produce chemical reactions that will clog the rock’s pores faster than water alone, thus reducing the amount of time in which H₂ can be produced

item.title: Shell's Dutch chief exits for new role
item.description: Dutch-German transmission system operator hires Shell’s Dutch president, who has worked at the oil giant since the 1980s

item.title: JGC confirms involvement in $5 billion contract for Eni FLNG project
item.description: First production from Coral Norte vessel in Mozambique scheduled for 2028

item.title: Petrobras agrees contracts for eight Ivory Coast blocks
item.description: One block missing from the nine Brazilian major sought originally

item.title: Eni creates new Asia satellite with Petronas joint venture
item.description: Searah commands initial production base of over 300,000 boepd, expected to grow to 500,000 boepd in three years

item.title: Ownership changes revealed in Norway's largest oilfield
item.description: Aker BP announces small increase in stake at Johan Sverdrup oilfield

item.title: Eni weighs up responses from FPSO suppliers keen to provide Nigeria vessel
item.description: Contractors wait to hear who will be sent bid documents for 150,000 bpd Zabazaba vessel

item.title: Medco Energi appoints new chief executive
item.description: Roberto Lorato no longer at the helm of Indonesia's leading independent

item.title: Middle East disruption unlikely to accelerate EU transition away from gas
item.description: Disruption across the Middle East has choked LNG supplies to Europe and pushed up prices

item.title: Shell ups the ante in Oz decommissioning legal wrangle
item.description: Dispute with former partners centres on costs for Northern Endeavour FPSO

item.title: Asian operator launches offshore seismic tender for five promising basins
item.description: ONGC has set its capital expenditure target for the 2026-2027 financial year at up to $3.34 billion

item.title: Asean energy heavyweights team up on oil recovery initiative
Asian energy heavyweights team up on oil recovery initiative
item.description: Petronas, PTTEP and Pertamina to assess enhanced oil recovery opportunity offshore

item.title: Petronas, PTTEP and Pertamina team up on oil recovery initiative
item.description: Petronas, PTTEP and Pertamina to assess enhanced oil recovery opportunity offshore

item.title: Conrad seals rig deal for Mako gas development offshore Indonesia
item.description: Pertamina Drilling-ADES consortium will supply jack-up for wells and installation of CSF

item.title: Sable Offshore heads to federal court in bid to defeat California
item.description: The company is in the middle of a battle pitting the Trump administration against California energy policy

item.title: Majors steer clear of Alaska wildlife refuge lease sale
item.description: Five of 58 tracts were sold, mostly to a state-owned development corporation

item.title: Operator confirms gas ‘presence’ in promising Andaman offshore exploration well
item.description: Indian operator has now established presence of hydrocarbons at two of three exploration wells it has drilled in Andaman basin
